hero.headline: I care about the details that make software succeed.
hero.subline: From smooth go-lives to efficient, high-performance systems - I focus on what actually matters in production and refine until it works the way it should.

about.description: I build software with real-world constraints in mind, with a strong focus on detail to ensure smooth and predictable go-lives. I care about the small things that make systems reliable in production. I'm naturally curious about efficient and high-performance solutions and enjoy refining systems until they truly hold up in practice.
highlights: Strong focus on production readiness and smooth deployments
Experience with micro-frontends and scalable architectures
Driven by performance, efficiency, and clean system design
Cut CI/CD pipeline runtime by 50% (20 → 10 min) through Docker optimization, layer caching, and streamlined build steps
Led migration of ~32k products from legacy system to new platform with zero downtime, enabling smooth onboarding of a new brand
Implemented faceted search for 60k products using Algolia, improving discoverability and increasing add-to-cart rates
Built a Slack integration aggregating logs and metrics across tools, improving observability and reducing incident response time
Extended E2E testing with full UI user journeys, enabling faster detection of faulty deployments
Contributed to a scalable, brand-aware design system for a multi-brand platform
Introduction into Micro-frontends / Micro-services architecture by contributing in a large-scale migration from legacy system
Developed a BMW web application to remote control vehicle features with real-time communication systems (WebSockets)
Introduction into web-development with Angular by maintaining a loyalty partner management system and verifying functionality with Protractor E2E testing

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Modern platform focused on performance, scalability, and user experience using micro-frontends and service-based architecture.

projects.name: Automotive Web App
projects.description: Web application enabling remote control of vehicle functions via real-time communication.

projects.name: Loyalty Platform
projects.description: Internal enterprise system supporting partner integrations, user engagement, and configurable business logic.

talks.title: Working with Micro-Frontends after 2 Years in Production
